Large-capacity battery, using low-power micro-power technology combined with chip low-power technology, greatly improving the use time.

Upgrade composite diaphragm

The carbon fiber composite diaphragm + large moving coil acoustic.technology resonates under the action of magnetism and electricity,and restores the shocking sound quality of high-frequency, intermediate-frequency and low-frequency music with high fidelity.

New second-generation chip

Using the new Bluetooth 5.0 technology, it is smaller, more,powerful, lower power consumption, and longer battery life.

IPX5 waterproof

The multi-process rigorous design prevents sweat and rain from damaging the earphone components, making it more reliable to use.

More convenient

wireless connection Using Bluetooth 5.0 wireless connection technology, bid farewell to the traditional complicated wired earphones and enjoy good music time.

Silicone material

45° inclined earplug design 45°tilt, provide comfortable wearing and excellent sound insulation and noise reduction, sports ear caps prevent falling.Humanized design Magnetic earplugs for convenient storage When not in use, the earphones can be hung comfortably and safely on the neck, and the magnetic earplugs can prevent the wire from tangling. Lenovo Skin-friendly material The earphone cable is soft, comfortable to wear,and convenient to store and carry.

Magnetic design

The earphones are designed with magnetic absorption and convenient storage, which is not easy to fall and is stable to wear.

Charge for 10 minutes, enjoy for 10 hours.

Photos and illustrations concern both the Bullets Wireless Z and Bass Edition models. Please refer to our product page for that of specific models.

A 10 minute charge for 10 hours of music

Your Bullets Wireless Z series headphones are ready before you are. A single 10 minute charge gives you 10 hours of music and movies4. A full charge provides up to 20 / 17 hours1 of battery life, so you can keep the music going.

Easy listening

With convenient features like Quick Switch13, Quick Pair6 and Magnetic Control, listening to your music has never been this simple.

*Quick Switch feature on Bass Edition behaves differently. Instead of a physical function button, users will be able to switch between 3 paired devices instantly by selecting Bass Edition among Bluetooth settings on said paired devices.

Bass Re-engineered5

With a 9.2mm dynamic driver and super bass tone fitted in each earbud, you get to experience rich sound and superior tonality every time you press play.
